Helicopter

💪 Pilates · Barrel

Also known as: helicopter legs, spine corrector helicopter, helicopter pilates

Log it by text

Reps
/helicopter 10
Sets × Reps
/helicopter 3x10
also valid: /log helicopter 3x10

Underscores, dashes, and spaces are interchangeable — every spelling above logs the same exercise.
